(2) ^TOTI^T k\Ur\*$ ^i TPTFJ ^ t& ^ f f a TTT^R, I TO^T, 2011 ^r i $ t fflfkg ^ ^ •$ t%7(fT W t t frrcfflfr ^3R1 STfapFUT * » I [TR*i 19012/3/2007-^.3TR:] ^. ^. ^TB*F, ^fg^r *rf^f MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTD7ICATION New Delhi, the 1 st November, 2011 GS.R 791(E). — In exercise ofthe powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section I of the Orissa (Alteration of Name) Act, 2011 (15 of 2011), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of November, 2011, as the date on which the provisions of the said Act shall come into force.
